name: LSD
description: LSD is the AI-assisted liquid staking optimizer for Solana that delivers superior risk-adjusted yields without requiring users to constantly monitor the ecosystem. By depositing SOL, users receive lsSOL—a fully liquid token—while LSD’s proprietary allocation engine continuously evaluates and redistributes capital across the best validators, Jito MEV clients, stake pools, and incentive programs based on real-time yield, risk, liquidity, and network conditions. Unlike static liquid staking protocols, LSD uses a sophisticated risk-adjusted scoring model and adaptive rebalancing logic to maximize sustainable returns while minimizing downside exposure. Transparent dashboards, historical performance tracking, and user-selectable risk profiles (Conservative, Balanced, Growth) make institutional-grade staking accessible to everyone. LSD represents the evolution of liquid staking on Solana—intelligent, dynamic, and relentlessly focused on capital efficiency.
